API Design & Description in the Age of AI

Outline (API Design & Description in the Age of AI)

  1. API Design & Description in the Age of AI [6]
  2. Exposing API Landscapes for AI Consumption [0]
API Design & Description in the Age of AI Thilo Frotscher & Erik Wilde: APIs für die AI Nutzung: Wie geht das?

(5) Creating APIs (in the old days…)

  • Requirements Analysis
    • Talk to your consumers
    • Outside-in approach
  • API First
    • Imagine you are on a greenfield
    • Do not create APIs based on existing systems or use cases


API Design & Description in the Age of AI Thilo Frotscher & Erik Wilde: APIs für die AI Nutzung: Wie geht das?

(6) Creating APIs (in the old days…)

  • API Design
    • Use iterative approach of design – review - design
    • Implement good practices for API Design
    • Make sure to have API Design Guidelines in your organization
    • Focus on usability, consistency, comprehensibility, extensibility
    • Use naming conventions and consistent endpoint structures
    • Favor generic APIs over support for specific consumers / use cases


API Design & Description in the Age of AI Thilo Frotscher & Erik Wilde: APIs für die AI Nutzung: Wie geht das?

(7) Creating APIs (in the old days…)

  • API specification
    • Use standard description languages, like OpenAPI or AsyncAPI
    • Make sure to document as many aspects as possible, including all response status codes, parameters and attributes


API Design & Description in the Age of AI Thilo Frotscher & Erik Wilde: APIs für die AI Nutzung: Wie geht das?

(8) Creating APIs (in the old days…)

  • API documentation
    • Technical details missing in the API specification
    • Information explaining how endpoints work
    • Semantics of data structures and runtime behaviour
    • SDKs, quick-start guides


API Design & Description in the Age of AI Thilo Frotscher & Erik Wilde: APIs für die AI Nutzung: Wie geht das?

(9) Creating APIs (in the old days…)

  • Make APIs discoverable
    • Registers APIs in dev portals, API marketplaces or internal catalogs
    • Provide metadata, tags and standardized authentication details
    • Offer sandbox environments and test credentials
    • Maintain backwards compatibility


API Design & Description in the Age of AI Thilo Frotscher & Erik Wilde: APIs für die AI Nutzung: Wie geht das?

(10) Today: AI Everywhere

  • AI Coding Agents generate code that consumes APIs
  • AI Business Agents discover and consume APIs autonomously
  • What does all this mean for API providers?
    • What changes, what stays the same?


Exposing API Landscapes for AI Consumption
